calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenederloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
No appearance by the Defendant: Barbara Sweeney.
9:20 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Brian Dold, was sworn and direct examined.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at 174 Ellis Street, #201, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Rent $700.00
Attorney's Fees is not requested or awarded.
Costs is waived.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
